title: tools-runner Activity
description: A JL activity: a library of named actions plus loading metadata. JL program files use compound extensions <name>.jl.<syntax> (.jl.jsonc canonical; .jl.ts/.jl.js/.jl.mjs/.jl.cjs when carrying JS actions). Validated at load time by Activities (ajv); the $schema key is allowed for documentation/tooling.

base_dir.description: Base directory the activity operates in, relative to cwd.

requires.description: Vocabulary packages needed, like CL's (require :sb-posix). Core (cl/jmc/jl) is always loaded. {use: false} = qualified action names only. Groups: sbcl, quicklisp, host.

dependencies.description: Paths of other activity files to plug recursively.

actions.description: Named actions: JL expressions (arrays/atoms), action-name strings, or (in .jl.ts/.jl.js files) JS functions. `default` runs when no action is named on the CLI.
